title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 14 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 14 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 14 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.26 % today, the main contract closed at 965.5. The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 983 yuan/mt.
